title: CONFIG_LICHEN_L2 has implicit dependency on LICHEN_LINK not enforced in Kconfig
description:
Location:
- firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/Kconfig:48-61 (CONFIG_LICHEN_L2 definition)
- firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c:71-74 (BUILD_ASSERT requiring HAVE_LICHEN_LINK)

Risk: The Kconfig for LICHEN_L2 does not list CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK as a dependency, but the code has a BUILD_ASSERT that requires HAVE_LICHEN_LINK (which maps to CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK).

This means:
1. A user can enable LICHEN_L2 without LICHEN_LINK via menuconfig
2. Build fails with an unclear BUILD_ASSERT message about CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK is required
3. User does not understand why their menuconfig selection does not work

Pattern generating user issue reports: Why does enabling LICHEN_L2 in menuconfig cause a build error about LICHEN_LINK?

Suggested fix: Add depends on LICHEN_LINK to the CONFIG_LICHEN_L2 Kconfig entry. This makes the dependency visible in menuconfig and prevents invalid configurations.
close_reason: Added 'depends on LICHEN_LINK' to CONFIG_LICHEN_L2 in Kconfig, making the dependency visible in menuconfig and preventing invalid configurations
